# Support Policy 🤝

We want you to have the best experience with **TicketsPlease**. Here is how you
can get help:

## 🔍 Before you ask

- Check our [Documentation](../docs/) for architecture and setup details.
- Search [Existing Issues](https://github.com/Tobia/TicketsPlease/issues) to see
  if your question has already been answered.

## 📢 Where to get help

- **GitHub Issues:** For bug reports and feature requests. Please use our
  templates.
- **Discussions:** For general questions, architectural debates, and "How-to"
  queries.
- **Security:** If you found a vulnerability, please refer to our
  [Security Policy](SECURITY.md).

## 🚀 Enterprise Support

If you are using the **Enterprise Edition** of TicketsPlease, please contact
your dedicated account manager or use the internal support portal for
prioritized assistance.
